ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the hotel's review page */,
  "price" REAL /* Average price per night */,
  "note" REAL /* Rating of the hotel */,
  "nbr_review" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the hotel */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Location or destination of the hotel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the hotel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the hotel's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the hotel's location */,
  "hotel_type" TEXT /* Type of hotel (e.g., luxury, budget, boutique) */,
  "parking_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of parking at the hotel */,
  "hotel_policies" TEXT /* Hotel policies (e.g., check-in/check-out times, cancellation policies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  "stay_dates" TEXT /* Dates of the user's stay at the hotel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel booked */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel offering the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity (e.g., dining, recreation, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., Paris) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotel_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotel_images_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hotel whose price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at the time of recording */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "pricing_type" TEXT /* Type of pricing (e.g., average, minimum, maximum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., guest, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the preference belongs */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., favorite_destination) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., Paris) */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., destination, hotel type, amenities) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, review response) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., entertainment, business, wellness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)
